subcodes.first_line: O leaf of God's paradise and fruit of the eternal garden of the All-Merciful! Until now, means and channels [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه فردوس الهی و ثمره حدیقه خلد حضرت رحمانی تا به حال وسیله و واسطه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart
